statement: In every magma, Equation 756 (`x = y * (z * ((x * w) * u))`) implies Equation 213 (`x = (x * (y * y)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0567
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op x w) u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op x (op y y)) z)
